ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transition_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the transition effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transition effect */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transition effect is deprecated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the transition effect belongs (e.g., sliding, fading) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category to which the transition effect belongs (e.g., horizontal slide, vertical slide) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the transition effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effect_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition effect the option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the option's value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the option is deprecated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_options_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("effect_id") REFERENCES transition_effects ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option the value belongs to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this is the default value for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_values_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES effect_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effect_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition effect being configured */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the configuration */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option being configured */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value selected for the option */,
  "custom_value" TEXT /* Custom value if the user specifies one */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the value is the default */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_configurations_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES effect_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_configurations_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("effect_id") REFERENCES transition_effects ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the configuration history */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES effect_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., clicks, impressions) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES effect_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
